# eslint-plugin-graphql

This is a vendored copy of `eslint-plugin-graphql@4.0.0` from
https://github.com/apollographql/eslint-plugin-graphql with its
`graphql-config` dependency updated to a patched major version. The upstream
package is no longer published with dependency updates, but EAS CLI still uses
its legacy rule names through oxlint's JavaScript plugin support.
